testcase.name: delete article

failure.message:
`cy.request()` failed on:
https://conduit-api.bondaracademy.com/api/articles/
The response we received from your web server was:
> 422: Unprocessable Entity
This was considered a failure because the status code was not `2xx` or `3xx`.
If you do not want status codes to cause failures pass the option: `failOnStatusCode: false`
-----------------------------------------------------------
The request we sent was:
Method: POST URL: https://conduit-api.bondaracademy.com/api/articles/ Headers: { "Connection": "keep-alive", "Authorization": "Token eyJhbGciOiJIUzI1NiIsInR5cCI6IkpXVCJ9.eyJ1c2VyIjp7ImlkIjo0OTI0N30sImlhdCI6MTc3Mzc5MzE4OSwiZXhwIjoxNzc4OTc3MTg5fQ.kYI8yQDtuK6VA7_DjjG1vyXfTH0OHEkiRveOhuMOqss", "user-agent": "Mozilla/5.0 (Windows NT 10.0; Win64; x64) AppleWebKit/537.36 (KHTML, like Gecko) HeadlessChrome/146.0.0.0 Safari/537.36", "accept": "*/*", "accept-encoding": "gzip, deflate", "content-type": "application/json", "content-length": 112 } Body: {"article":{"title":"Test title Cypress","description":"Some description","body":"This is a body","tagList":[]}}
-----------------------------------------------------------
The response we got was:
Status: 422 - Unprocessable Entity Headers: { "x-powered-by": "Express", "vary": "Origin", "content-type": "application/json; charset=utf-8", "etag": "W/\"27-BNeuaWQ7DHvW/r+pl+qdJiF06Is\"", "x-cloud-trace-context": "7ce2ba0415a3f27d5492ec7e9677f2c7", "date": "Wed, 18 Mar 2026 00:19:49 GMT", "server": "Google Frontend", "content-length": "39" } Body: { "errors": { "title": [ "must be unique" ] } }
https://on.cypress.io/request

testcase.failure:
CypressError: `cy.request()` failed on:
https://conduit-api.bondaracademy.com/api/articles/
The response we received from your web server was:
> 422: Unprocessable Entity
This was considered a failure because the status code was not `2xx` or `3xx`.
If you do not want status codes to cause failures pass the option: `failOnStatusCode: false`
-----------------------------------------------------------
The request we sent was:
Method: POST URL: https://conduit-api.bondaracademy.com/api/articles/ Headers: { "Connection": "keep-alive", "Authorization": "Token eyJhbGciOiJIUzI1NiIsInR5cCI6IkpXVCJ9.eyJ1c2VyIjp7ImlkIjo0OTI0N30sImlhdCI6MTc3Mzc5MzE4OSwiZXhwIjoxNzc4OTc3MTg5fQ.kYI8yQDtuK6VA7_DjjG1vyXfTH0OHEkiRveOhuMOqss", "user-agent": "Mozilla/5.0 (Windows NT 10.0; Win64; x64) AppleWebKit/537.36 (KHTML, like Gecko) HeadlessChrome/146.0.0.0 Safari/537.36", "accept": "*/*", "accept-encoding": "gzip, deflate", "content-type": "application/json", "content-length": 112 } Body: {"article":{"title":"Test title Cypress","description":"Some description","body":"This is a body","tagList":[]}}
-----------------------------------------------------------
The response we got was:
Status: 422 - Unprocessable Entity Headers: { "x-powered-by": "Express", "vary": "Origin", "content-type": "application/json; charset=utf-8", "etag": "W/\"27-BNeuaWQ7DHvW/r+pl+qdJiF06Is\"", "x-cloud-trace-context": "7ce2ba0415a3f27d5492ec7e9677f2c7", "date": "Wed, 18 Mar 2026 00:19:49 GMT", "server": "Google Frontend", "content-length": "39" } Body: { "errors": { "title": [ "must be unique" ] } }

testcase.name: waiting for apis

failure.message: expected 'Test title Cypress' to include 'Bondar Academy'

testcase.name: "before each" hook: Open test application for "Hello world 1"
testcase.classname: "before each" hook: Open test application for "Hello world 1"

failure.message: Timed out retrying after 4050ms: `cy.click()` failed because this element: `...` is being covered by another element: `...` Fix this problem, or use {force: true} to disable error checking. https://on.cypress.io/element-cannot-be-interacted-with Because this error occurred during a `before each` hook we are skipping all of the remaining tests.

testcase.name: retry tests

failure.message: Timed out retrying after 4000ms: expected '<app-favorite-button.pull-xs-right>' to contain text '99999999', but the text was ' 9999999 '

testcase.failure:
AssertionError: Timed out retrying after 4000ms: expected '<app-favorite-button.pull-xs-right>' to contain text '99999999', but the text was ' 9999999 ' at Context.eval (webpack://vite-cypress/./src/tests/e2e/more/retryTests.api-cy.ts:10:40)
+ expected - actual
-' 9999999 ' +'99999999'
